'''Caaraz''' was a tide-locked, tectonically active [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Its night-side was frozen with glaciers. Its day-side was scorching. In between was a thin, habitable region in which the [[Ranth]] race evolved. Both sides of the planet were tectonically active as well, allowing subterranean gases, [[Magma/Legends|lava]], and steam to escape into the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] discovered the world while looking for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] bases, and later [[Mining/Legends|mined]] the planet. Two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] also provided illumination to the night-side of the planet.
